description.markdown:
References, quotes, and images from Tess Murdoch’s piece [“Felt Time”] (are.na/editorial/felt-time) on Are.na Editorial. This is a partial transcript of [episode two] (https://radio.montezpress.com/#/show/3470) of our show with Montez Press Radio.
